vibe: Command-center, data-rich, high-end developer tool, futuristic but utilitarian.

typography.guidelines: Do not use generic fonts for headings. Use JetBrains Mono for all headings and UI labels to give a technical/developer feel. IBM Plex Sans for body text to maintain legibility.

colors.guidelines: Swiss High-Contrast in Dark Mode: Mostly monochrome (black/grey/white) with high-contrast Yellow (#FACC15) for CTAs and Blue/Red for specific status indicators. Never use muddy greys; tint with cool or warm tones. Text must have at least 4.5:1 contrast.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense, compact spacing for dashboard utility.
spacing_and_layout.scale: Tailwind spacing scale. Padding inside cards should be p-6. Gaps should be gap-4 or gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-md (max 6px). Keep edges relatively sharp to match the technical tool vibe.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content. Top-left optical alignment.
spacing_and_layout.guidelines: Use 'Grid Borders' style: border-collapse layouts or 1px subtle borders (border-white/10) around sections. The Logic Engine panel should lean into the 'Retro-Futurism' terminal look (dark indigo/black with monospace typography).

components.buttons: Sharp corners or slight radius (rounded-md). High contrast background (Yellow) with dark text for primary. Subtle border with hover lift for secondary.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), no drop shadow. On hover, border color lightens (border-zinc-600) but background stays flat.
components.navigation: Left sidebar (w-64) with stark contrast to the main content area. Links should have a subtle background shift and text brighten on hover. Keep a sticky top header in the main view for breadcrumbs and project selection.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI inputs customized with bg-zinc-950, border-zinc-800, focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-400.
components.charts: If visualizing stats, use strict geometric lines, monochrome grey data points with one yellow/blue highlight.

motion.guidelines: Minimalist micro-interactions. Very fast transitions (150ms) to feel snappy like a pro tool. Hover states should brighten borders and text. Page transitions should be simple fade-ins.

assets.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - strict geometric and technical look, perfect for a developer tool dashboard.

images.description: Futuristic abstract geometric hexagonal pattern. Use as a very subtle background for the main dashboard welcome state, with heavy opacity overlay (bg-black/80).
Vibrant surreal landscape to represent an RPG or Platformer game project thumbnail.
Digital square object desert to represent a Sci-fi Shooter or Strategy game project thumbnail.
Abstract dark red geometric background for a Puzzle or Casino game thumbnail.

assets.guidelines: Never use placeholder images. If rendering thumbnails for game projects, use the provided digital art and geometric landscape images.

pages: Dashboard: List of recent game projects, quick stats, 'Create New Game' CTA.
Vision Engine: UI for generating sprites/backgrounds. Prompts input + grid of output images.
Logic Engine: Node/Code view for setting mechanics, RTP, rules.
Composer: Layout view combining generated assets and logic into a 'bundle'.
Stats Overview: High-level metrics on generated games, API usage, or player simulated stats.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a full dashboard layout. Sidebar navigation to switch between the 5 panels. The initial state should be the Dashboard view showing game projects. Use Shadcn components heavily (Buttons, Cards, Inputs, Tabs for sub-navigation, Dialogs for creation). Apply the JetBrains Mono font globally to headers. Override Shadcn default borders and backgrounds to match the #09090B / #18181B dark theme. Do NOT use standard Shadcn blue; use Yellow (#FACC15) for CTAs. Remember to install @phosphor-icons/react.
